articles.title: Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (Mar. 25)
articles.description:
ABINGTON 333 Groveland St. Three-family family flat, built in 1900, 4,248 square feet, 15 rooms, 9 bedrooms, 3 baths, on 104,090-square-foot lot. $875,000 67 Beaver Lane. One-family raised ranch, built in 1976, 1,685 square feet, 6 rooms, 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, on 22,197-square-foot lot. $750,000 135 Bank St. One-family conventional, built in 1901, 1,413 square […]

The post Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (Mar. 25) appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Recent home sales in Greater Boston include a three-family flat in Abington for $875,000.
A one-family raised ranch on Beaver Lane sold for $750,000, reflecting market trends.
These sales indicate ongoing demand for diverse housing options in the Greater Boston area.
